content.en:
The weakness of destroying living beings is the soul, and in fact, it is also a weakness of all cultivators in this universe.

However, the protection of the soul of cultivators is stronger than that of destroying creatures, and at the very least, cultivators of the cosmic god level will definitely have powerful soul defense treasures.

In addition, although the souls of the cosmic gods are weak, they are relatively tenacious, and they are not too easy to annihilate.

And the soul of this destructive creature is very weak, weaker than the average cosmic god.

If it weren't for the many, Ye Tian wouldn't be able to annihilate the soul of this destructive creature with one blow.

Distance.

The undead army masters were also quite shocked when they saw Ye Tian kill the destructive creatures.

They thought that Ye Tian would need a little more time before he could kill the Destroying Creature, or that the Destroying Creature had successfully escaped by some means.

Unexpectedly, Ye Tian had killed the Destruction Creature in an instant just now, and he still used the Soul Secret Technique.

"What a terrifying soul secret technique, that soul aura is far beyond my imagination. How can this be, the realm of the Ten Thousand Laws True Monarch is only at the peak of the galaxy level, although the immortal soul can be enhanced, there are too few treasures in the universe that can enhance the soul, and the effect is very average. But the immortal soul of the Ten Thousand Law True Monarch was not only ten times more powerful than an ordinary galaxy-level powerhouse, but even more terrifyingly powerful, far beyond calculation! Even a cosmic god like me could not compare with it. If I can't protect my soul, I will also be instantly killed by the Ten Thousand Laws True Monarch using the Soul Secret Technique!"

The Undead Master thought.

The other three cosmic gods also thought of this, and they were shocked one by one.

At this time, their eyes looking at Ye Tian were full of awe.

In the past, they may only regard Ye Tian as a genius with unlimited potential, but not Ye Tian's strength, thinking that no matter how strong Ye Tian is, he is just a rising star.

But now, Ye Tian has truly surpassed them, reaching a point where they will not be able to reach it in their lifetime, and the gap between them will become bigger and bigger in the future, they naturally dare not have the slightest contempt, only endless awe.

"Ten Thousand Laws True Monarch!"

"Ten Thousand Laws True Monarch!"

"Ten Thousand Laws True Monarch!"

The Immortal Army Lord and other cosmic gods flew in front of Ye Tian and said respectfully.

"You're here too!"

Ye Tian said softly.

In fact, he had already found out that the undead army master and others were coming, but the undead army master and others couldn't help at all, so he didn't call them to help.

"Wanfa Zhenjun, what is the origin of this monster? It seems that some monsters have appeared in the major star fields of the human race, and they don't know where they came from!"

The undead army lord asked curiously.

"I do know the origin of this monster!" Ye Tian admitted, "However, it is not good for you to know too much, because this involves an important secret. If it weren't for my special status, I wouldn't have known this secret. "

As soon as the undead army lord and other cosmic gods heard this, they knew that the identity of this monster was not simple, and its origin was very large.

Their level is too low to cover such secrets.

At this time, Ye Tian said again: "But I can tell you that there are many of these monsters, and many of them are not even opponents of the strongest supreme of our human race. It is the enemy of all races in the entire universe and will be besieged by all races. According to my guess, these monsters won't be around forever, and they will probably be destroyed soon, so you don't have to worry too much. But for a while, you should pay attention and try to be careful. Remember, these monsters like to hide in places with a strong aura of destruction, and try not to go to these places, otherwise it is easy to run into these monsters!"

"Thank you Wanfa Zhenjun for reminding me!"

The Immortal Lord and other cosmic gods gratefully.

Immediately, the undead army master and the others left.

Bao Buddha Zhenjun and the others were ready to come over to chat with Ye Tian at this time and compliment Ye Tian.

After all, Ye Tian came from the Milky Way, and he was so powerful, he was almost the strongest person in the Disk Domain.

If you can have a little relationship with Ye Tian, wouldn't it be developed in the future?

But before they could come, Ye Tian moved everyone out of the spaceship, and then Ye Tian left with the spaceship.

Before leaving, he left only one sentence.

"The monster has been solved, and the galaxy is safe for the time being. If something similar happens in the future, just notify the Heavenly Pavilion Branch on Earth. The Tiange branch has a way to contact the Tiange headquarters, and I will naturally know!"

After saying this, there was no longer Ye Tian's figure in the starry sky.

......

Soon after.

Tianlan Big City, Tiange headquarters.

Ye Tian is back.

As soon as possible, his wife Xiao Yue came over and asked about the situation.

"Husband, what's going on in the galaxy?"

Xiao Yue asked.

Ye Tiandao: "A destructive creature appeared over there, and I killed it!"

Xiao Yue also knew about the destruction of creatures, because after Ye Tian learned the origin of the destruction creatures from the Dark Lord for the first time, he informed Ye Tian of the situation of the destruction of creatures.

Therefore, Xiao Yue also knows the horror of destroying creatures.

Therefore, at this time, Xiao Yue was not only not excited, but showed a worried look: "Husband, those destroying creatures are too powerful, and now those supremes are probably very busy, and they may not have time to pay attention to you." What if you encounter a terrible creature of destruction?

"Good!"

Ye Tian nodded.

If it weren't for something happening in the galaxy, he wouldn't have gone out.

And the Terrans won't let him help at the galaxy level, so for the time being, he doesn't need to go out again.

Seeing that Ye Tian agreed, Xiao Yue breathed a sigh of relief and smiled.

In the following days, Ye Tian began a new round of cultivation.

Compress the immortal power every day and expand the Chaos Ancient Realm.

Although his cultivation had reached the peak of the galaxy level, the Chaos Ancient Realm could still be expanded, and he had not yet reached the limit of the galaxy level.

Therefore, Ye Tian would not give up his cultivation in the Chaos Ancient Realm.

At the same time, Ye Tian was also contemplating the Chaos Dao, striving to be able to comprehend the Chaos Dao to the realm of the Law Phase as soon as possible.

Once he reached the Chaos Dao Law Phase, then Ye Tian's strength would be one step closer.

In a flash, a year has passed.

In the past year, the incidents of monster attacks in the major star fields of the human race have become rare, but there is still news of the fall of the human cosmic god or the master, although it is rare, but there are still there.

You must know that those top cosmic gods and masters, every fall is a huge loss, even if they can be resurrected with the help of Zichenmu, but the price is so great, maybe it is no less than the price required to cultivate a master.

this day.

Ye Tian got the news that the Kunwu Supreme had returned to the Supreme Hall of the Human Race.

For the first time, Ye Tian went to the Supreme Hall of the Human Race and asked to see the Kunwu Supreme!
